zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Katharina Thielheim於從1670年到1675年出生在德國貝也普法爾茲時，她的父親Nikolaus Thilheim26歲，母親Anna Maria Catherina Brück26歲。她於1699年10月6日與Johann Georg Vogelgesang在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯格斯海姆盧本海姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1718年5月2日在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯格斯海姆賀比海姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Katharina Thielheim于从1670年到1675年出生在德国貝也普法爾茲时，她的父亲Nikolaus Thilheim26岁，母亲Anna Maria Catherina Brück26岁。她于1699年10月6日与Johann Georg Vogelgesang在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯格斯海姆盧本海姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1718年5月2日在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯格斯海姆賀比海姆。

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: Katharina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Katharina Thielheim was born from 1670 to 1675, in Palatinate, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Nikolaus Thilheim, was 26 and her mother, Anna Maria Catherina Brück, was 26. She married Johann Georg Vogelgesang on 6 October 1699, in Rubenheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 2 May 1718, in Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Katharina Thielheim est née du 1670 au 1675, à Pfalz, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Nikolaus Thilheim, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anna Maria Catherina Brück, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Johann Georg Vogelgesang le 6 octobre 1699, à Rubenheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 mai 1718, à Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Katharina Thielheim von 1670 bis 1675 in Pfalz, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nikolaus Thilheim 26 und ihre Mutter Anna Maria Catherina Brück 26. Sie hat am 6. Oktober 1699 in Rubenheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland Johann Georg Vogelgesang geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Mai 1718 in Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Katharina Thielheim è nata il da 1670 a 1675 nel Pfalz, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Nikolaus Thilheim, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Anna Maria Catherina Brück, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Johann Georg Vogelgesang il 6 ottobre 1699, nel Rubenheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 2 maggio 1718, nel Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Katharina Thielheimがから1670年まで1675年にドイツバイエルンプファルズで生まれた時，父Nikolaus Thilheimは26歳，母Anna Maria Catherina Brückは26歳であった。1699年10月6日にドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスジャーシェイムルベンヘイムでJohann Georg Vogelgesangと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1718年5月2日にドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスジャーシェイムハービトズヘイムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Katharina Thielheim(이)가 1670년 부터 1675년 까지 독일 베이른 p팔즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nikolaus Thilheim(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Maria Catherina Brück(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1699년 10월 6일 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 그르셰임 루벤하임에서 Johann Georg Vogelgesang(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1718년 5월 2일 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 그르셰임 허비츠하임에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Katharina Thielheim nasceu de 1670 a 1675, em Pfalz, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Nikolaus Thilheim, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Anna Maria Catherina Brück, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Johann Georg Vogelgesang em 6 de outubro de 1699, em Rubenheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de maio de 1718, em Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Katharina Thielheim родилась с 1670 по 1675 в местности пфалз, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Nikolaus Thilheim было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Maria Catherina Brück, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johann Georg Vogelgesang 6 октября 1699 г. в местности рубеним, джиршим, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 2 мая 1718 г. в местности хирбицхим, джиршим, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Katharina Thielheim nació desde 1670 hasta 1675, en Pfalz, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Nikolaus Thilheim, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Anna Maria Catherina Brück, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Johann Georg Vogelgesang el 6 de octubre de 1699, en Rubenheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 2 de mayo de 1718, en Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania.
